overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Del Perro beach promenade on a sunny morning. The character moves past colorful beachfront shops, through a gazebo pavilion area overlooking the beach and pier, then continues along the urban sidewalk toward a busy intersection.

events.description: character passes a jogger running in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beachfront promenade past shops and benches

notable_agents.action: jogger running toward the camera along the promenade path

entered.detail: colorful two-story buildings with graffiti murals and storefronts
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
sandy beach area stretching to the water
distant pier structure with ferris wheel visible on the horizon
stone benches and trash cans along the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny beachfront promenade with colorful shops on the right and the beach on the left. Palm trees line the path, and the Del Perro pier is visible in the distance. A jogger passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachside pavilion with green metal gazebos

events.description: entering the covered gazebo area near the beach sand
character turns right to navigate around the gazebo structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the gazebo pavilion area and turning toward the beach overlook

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt sitting under the gazebo shade

entered.detail: green metal roofed pavilion structures with concrete seating
curved concrete wall and railing overlooking the beach

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered gazebo area with green metal roofs and concrete seating. The beach and pier become more prominent as the shops fall behind. The character turns toward the beach overlook, passing a person sitting under the gazebo.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with mixed residential buildings

events.description: exiting the beach gazebo area and entering the street side with buildings
character turns left at the corner to continue along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past apartment buildings, passing two men sitting on a wall

notable_agents.action: two men sitting on a concrete wall overlooking the beach, one shirtless

entered.detail: multi-story beige buildings with blue awnings and fire escapes
wooden telephone poles with overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the beach area and walks along an urban sidewalk lined with apartment buildings featuring blue awnings. Two men sit on a wall overlooking the beach. The character turns the corner and continues past utility poles and parked cars.

events.description: passing the prominent red Del Perro building with large wall signage
approaching intersection with vehicles visible crossing ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward a busy intersection with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall red brick building with large Del Perro signage and green trim
large historic building with yellow awnings at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the distinctive red Del Perro building with its prominent signage, approaching a busy intersection. The historic corner building with yellow awnings comes into view ahead, and vehicles are seen moving through the intersection as pedestrian density increases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny beachfront promenade that gradually transitions into a bustling urban intersection. It begins by following a character past colorful shops and palm trees with the Del Perro pier visible in the distance as a jogger passes by. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a semi-covered gazebo area with green metal roofs, where the view opens up toward the beach and pier before the shops fade from sight. The camera then follows the character away from the coast and onto an urban sidewalk lined with blue-awning apartments and parked cars. Finally, the path leads past a distinctive red building with prominent signage, turning toward a busy intersection where historic yellow-awning buildings and increasing vehicle traffic define the city landscape.
